name: My Bird
short_description: Your bird is one of the first birds to learn the basics of jet-powered flight
detailed_description:
Your bird is one of the first birds to learn the basics of jet-powered flight. However, all your work turned out to be in vain when it turned out that robots and other dangerous inventions of unknown origin were found in the area. Now, instead of making new discoveries, the bird will have to fly as far as possible before it is captured.

My Bird is a runner game where the player has to overcome various obstacles in the role of a bird with a jet engine and, collecting bonuses on the level, cover as far as possible.

Control:

Left Mouse Button\Space Bar - Rise

Game Features:

  • Visual style

  • Infinity

  • Complexity

supported_languages: English, Russian, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Bulgarian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, Greek, Hungarian, Indonesian, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Swedish, Thai, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese
